name: hyper-cloaking
description: Portable Hyper Cloaking skill for CloakBrowser-backed Playwright MCP workflows.

scripts.lint: oxlint plugins scripts tests tests/**/*.mjs packages/mcp-engine/src/**/*.mjs packages/mcp-engine/test/**/*.mjs packages/mcp-engine/scripts/**/*.mjs packages/mcp-server/src/**/*.mjs packages/mcp-server/test/**/*.mjs packages/mcp-server/scripts/**/*.mjs mcp/test/**/*.mjs mcp/*.mjs
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --fix plugins scripts tests tests/**/*.mjs packages/mcp-engine/src/**/*.mjs packages/mcp-engine/test/**/*.mjs packages/mcp-engine/scripts/**/*.mjs packages/mcp-server/src/**/*.mjs packages/mcp-server/test/**/*.mjs packages/mcp-server/scripts/**/*.mjs mcp/test/**/*.mjs mcp/*.mjs
scripts.mcp:test: npm --workspace packages/mcp-engine run test && npm --workspace packages/mcp-server run test && npm --workspace mcp run test
scripts.build: npm --workspace packages/mcp-engine run build && npm --workspace packages/mcp-server run build && npm --workspace mcp run build
scripts.ci: npm run validate && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test && npm run engine:validate && npm run mcp:test
scripts.ci:compat: npm test && npm run engine:validate && npm run mcp:test
